title: 黑域边界 Python 主线系统整体架构图
purpose: 当前版本展示素材，概括“自由自然语言输入 -> 语义裁定 -> 规则确认 -> 结构化状态提交 -> KP 叙述输出”的主回合链路。
mermaid:
flowchart TB classDef input fill:#EAF4FF,stroke:#2F6FEB,color:#0F2D5C,stroke-width:1.5px; classDef service fill:#FFF1DB,stroke:#C77B00,color:#5A3A00,stroke-width:1.5px; classDef core fill:#FCE8D8,stroke:#B45F06,color:#5A2D00,stroke-width:1.5px; classDef output fill:#E5F6EA,stroke:#2E8B57,color:#124D2A,stroke-width:1.5px; classDef asset fill:#F3F4F6,stroke:#6B7280,color:#374151,stroke-width:1.2px; classDef policy fill:#F9E8FF,stroke:#A855F7,color:#5B2174,stroke-width:1.2px; classDef data fill:#FFF7CC,stroke:#B38F00,color:#5A4700,stroke-width:1.2px; policy["设计铁律
1. 自由自然语言入口
2. LLM 先做语义裁定
3. 规则后置确认
4. 世界事实只能结构化提交
5. 除 KP 叙述外，其余信息尽量结构化"] subgraph L1["玩家与前端"] player["玩家
自由自然语言输入"] ui["Web UI / 调查界面
展示 ViewModel、检定卡、会话状态"] panel["系统提示侧栏
显示结构化提示，不进入聊天流"] end subgraph L2["Web / API / SSE"] http["Turn Submit API
HTTP 请求入口"] stream["SSE Event Stream
turn.started / turn.delta / turn.completed / turn.error"] end subgraph L3["应用服务与会话管理"] app["App Service Layer
Provider、模组、角色卡、Session 装配"] facade["ConversationRuntimeFacade
唯一合法回合入口"] end subgraph L4["对话运行时核心"] context["ContextBuilder
按槽位装配上下文"] adjudicator["SemanticAdjudicator
LLM-first 语义裁定"] turnplan["TurnPlan / PendingCheck / Scene Hint
结构化中间结果"] rule["RuleEngine
检定与硬规则结算"] scene["SceneDirector
场景提示与转场确认"] commit["StateCommitter
唯一事实提交口"] narration["NarrationService
KP 自然语言叙述"] memory["MemoryManager
短窗、摘要、事实索引"] result["TurnResult / ViewModel
结构化返回给前端"] end subgraph L5["内容资产 / Provider / 持久化"] provider["Provider Profiles
provider.txt / OpenAI-compatible / DeepSeek"] module["module.blackborder
模组内容与场景事实源"] character["character.alice
角色卡与数值面板"] runtime["RuntimeState
scene / clue / pending / state_vars"] session["SessionMetadata
session 绑定关系"] history["ConversationHistory
raw / summary / events / checkpoints"] uiState["UIState
界面恢复态与最近 ViewModel"] end policy -.约束.-> facade player --> ui panel --> ui ui --> http --> app --> facade facade --> context --> adjudicator --> turnplan --> rule --> scene --> commit --> narration --> memory --> result result --> stream --> ui ui --> player provider --> app module --> app character --> app session --> app runtime --> context history --> context character --> context module --> context commit --> runtime commit --> history commit --> uiState memory --> history uiState --> ui class player,ui,panel,http,stream input; class app,facade service; class context,adjudicator,turnplan,rule,scene,commit,memory core; class narration output; class provider,module,character,runtime,session,history,uiState asset; class policy policy; class result data;
notes: `ConversationRuntimeFacade` 是唯一回合中枢，Web 与资源装配都不能绕过它直接改世界状态。
`StateCommitter` 是唯一事实提交口，`RuntimeState / ConversationHistory / UIState` 都通过它落地。
`NarrationService` 只负责 KP 面向玩家的自然语言输出，其余链路统一走结构化对象。
